repos.name: google-labs-code/design.md
repos.desc: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

repos.name: calesthio/OpenMontage
repos.desc: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

repos.desc: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.

repos.name: mauriceboe/TREK
repos.desc: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

repos.name: apple/container
repos.desc: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

repos.name: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template

repos.name: aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws
repos.desc: Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS

repos.name: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
repos.desc: 817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0

repos.name: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
